package rulecoverage

func NegativeSleepPolling() string {
    ruleID := "sleep_polling"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "time.Sleep inside loops \u2014 often indicates polling or busy-wait style code."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
